question: What downstream borrower or sector case best grounds the transmission side of wealth concentration by showing how concentrated private-credit and non-bank intermediation can create a resilience squeeze beyond elite balance sheets?

expected_outputs.description: At least one new or updated grounding note
At least one grounded scenario update or named case variant

notes: Grounded the transmission side further through an India NBFC/MFI last-mile credit squeeze case, giving the branch a more downstream and borrower-facing transmission variant.
